outcomes.rollFlavourText: Procurement surge authorised. Supply lines activated under emergency mandate.
Threat environment remains elevated. Forward logistics contracts extended without review.
Operational tempo unchanged. No new allocation from central command.
Peacetime restructuring. Non-essential supply contracts reclassified and deferred.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Counter-cyclical — negative GMI produces positive delta. Classified bonus capacity unlocks per system rules.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: +$1 cash in any negative GMI year.
In any year following a negative GMI year (the prior-year rule applies): treat loan repayment roll as one higher on this asset, consistent with Defence prior-year loan terms.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap for each MFG asset you own (max +2).

cardDescription: Counter-cyclical T1 downstream asset. Generates $1 income per year; value rises in crisis conditions and falls during peacetime stability.
flavourText: Armies march on logistics. Empires run on supply chains.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: Signals intelligence demand spikes. Black budget line items approved without committee review.
Geopolitical posture elevated. Collection mandates expanded across all theatres.
No actionable threat detected. Allocation holds at prior-year baseline.
Détente declared. Several collection programmes placed under discretionary review.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Counter-cyclical — negative GMI produces positive delta. Classified bonus capacity unlocks per system rules.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: +$1 cash in any year with negative GMI. General CEO stacks — CEO + card = $2 per neg year with just one DEF asset at T1 mid.
+1 loan cap; +1 additional if value exceeds 14.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +1 additional if value exceeds 14.

cardDescription: Counter-cyclical T1 midstream asset. Generates $1 income per year; value increases under elevated threat conditions and contracts during periods of stability.
flavourText: Information is ammunition. Classified information is a monopoly.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: Emergency contract issued. Production orders expedited under crisis procurement authority.
Orders firm. Threat assessment supports continued manufacturing commitment.
Stable conditions persist. Existing contracts maintained; no new awards issued.
Demobilisation order received. Two programme lines placed in maintenance-only status.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Counter-cyclical — negative GMI produces positive delta. Classified bonus capacity unlocks per system rules (own 2 DEF placements; General: 1). Not re-stated here.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: In any year with negative GMI: +$1 cash. Complements General's Crisis Mobilisation — two separate $1 triggers from CEO + card.

cardDescription: Counter-cyclical T1 upstream asset. Zero stress on acquisition; generates $1 income per year with value gains driven by crisis and conflict.
flavourText: Peace is bad for business. Stability is worse.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: Strategic reserve drawdown authorised. Emergency procurement funding released ahead of schedule.
Threat posture elevated. Reserve replenishment contracts fast-tracked through acquisition.
Reserve levels nominal. No drawdown event; allocation unchanged from prior year.
Budget review season. Reserve programme flagged for efficiency audit; two contracts suspended.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Counter-cyclical — negative GMI produces positive delta. Classified bonus capacity unlocks per system rules.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +1 additional if value exceeds 24.
+$1 cash per negative GMI year. Stacks with General's Crisis Mobilisation.

cardDescription: Counter-cyclical T2 downstream asset. Generates $2 income per year; strong crisis upside with meaningful downside during peacetime budget cycles.
flavourText: Strategic reserves are the insurance policy nobody wants to cash.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: Critical infrastructure attack attributed. Cyber Command budget tripled under emergency session.
Threat actor activity elevated. Offensive capability contracts renewed at expanded scope.
No significant incident recorded. Cyber posture maintained at standing readiness level.
Peacetime review initiated. Discretionary cyber programmes deferred pending inter-agency assessment.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Counter-cyclical — negative GMI produces positive delta. Classified bonus capacity unlocks per system rules. CRISIS STRESS REDUCTION active.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Global event stress effects do not apply to you this year. General CEO: this mirrors and reinforces their Crisis Immunity passive — when both are active, any stress-applying global event is doubly negated (no stack needed; one immunity is sufficient).
+1 loan cap; +2 additional if value exceeds 22.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +1 additional if value exceeds 22.

cardDescription: Counter-cyclical T2 midstream asset. Crisis stress reduction active when integrated; value spikes under active threat conditions and contracts in peacetime.
flavourText: In cyberspace, defence is offence with better paperwork.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: Air superiority programme accelerated. Crisis procurement unlocks next-generation platform funding.
Threat assessment supports continued aerospace investment. Orders firmed through next fiscal cycle.
No new platform authorised. Existing contracts proceed on schedule without supplemental allocation.
Defence posture review underway. Aerospace modernisation programme placed in abeyance pending outcome.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Counter-cyclical — negative GMI produces positive delta. Classified bonus capacity unlocks per system rules.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +2 additional if value exceeds 20.

cardDescription: Counter-cyclical T2 upstream asset. Low stress acquisition; value scales with geopolitical tension and faces headwinds during stable peacetime conditions.
flavourText: The sky is the limit — until the contract says otherwise.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: Strategic emergency declared. Allied command activated; multi-theatre procurement authorised at full wartime tempo.
Alliance posture elevated. Joint procurement framework extended; member-state contributions confirmed.
Holding pattern maintained. Allied commitments stable; no new joint programme approved this cycle.
Budget review season across member states. Two joint programmes deferred; allied contributions renegotiated downward.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: Counter-cyclical — negative GMI produces positive delta. Classified bonus capacity unlocks per system rules.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: +$3 cash in any negative GMI year.
−1 stress in any year GMI is negative.

cardDescription: Counter-cyclical T3 downstream asset. High stress acquisition; largest crisis delta in the industry with integrated stress reduction and cash generation in negative GMI years.
flavourText: Alliances are just debts with flags.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: National emergency declared. Complex placed on full operational footing; classified funding streams activated.
Heightened national posture confirmed. Long-term complex expansion contracts awarded without competitive tender.
Steady state. No supplemental budget allocated; complex operates within existing annual appropriation.
Parliamentary budget review initiated. Non-critical complex programmes subject to efficiency mandate and phased reduction.

flavourText: National defence is the one budget line that never shrinks.
